summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Governance Engine Deliverables feature - Backend 100% functional, Frontend deliverables functionality working correctly with all 4 tabs and key features
passed_tests: Backend deliverables API endpoint (/api/assessments/{id}/deliverables) returns complete package
Individual deliverables endpoints working (roadmap, evidence-requests, compliance-checklist)
Deliverables API returns proper structure with all required fields
Roadmap contains immediate_actions, short_term_actions, medium_term_actions, structural_recommendations, executive_escalations
Evidence requests contain control_id, control_name, category, severity, required_artifacts, guidance
Compliance checklist contains item, status, priority, notes fields
Normative alignment contains iso_42001, eu_ai_act_lifecycle, nist_ai_rmf, canada_aida
Deliverables page loads from Assessment Results page via Deliverables button
Summary cards display correctly (Score: 100, Risk Tier: LOW, Evidence Requests: 8)
All 4 tabs present and functional (Roadmap, Evidence, Checklist, Guidance)
Roadmap tab displays remediation timeline and shows 'No remediation actions required' for high-scoring assessment
Evidence tab shows expandable evidence request items with required artifacts
Checklist tab displays compliance items with checkboxes and normative alignment section
Guidance tab shows sector-specific recommendations (SaaS sector)
Download All button present and functional
Copy Roadmap button present and functional
Navigation from Assessment Results to Deliverables page works correctly
